Hero.title: Target International School — Now in Germany
Hero.subtitle: Excellence in Education Since 2005
Hero.description: A comprehensive Business & IT focused education preparing students from grades 1–11 for successful global university admissions.

Academics.title: Academic Rigor
Academics.description: Our comprehensive SAT and IELTS preparation programs consistently yield scores in the top percentiles globally, ensuring direct entry into top-tier universities worldwide.
Academics.apTutorDesc: College Board accredited teaching for the Advanced Placement standard across 10+ subjects.
Academics.satCenterDesc: A recognized testing center offering comprehensive quantitative and verbal reasoning preparation.
Academics.rigorDesc: We demand excellence and foster critical thinking. Our rigorous academic environment challenges students to achieve their absolute full potential every single day.

About.title: Shaping Tomorrow's Leaders
About.subtitle: Target International School Profile
About.description1: At Target International School, we believe that education is not just about academic achievement, but about developing the whole person — inspiring confident, compassionate leaders who will shape a better future for our world.
About.description2: Guided by core values of Excellence, Innovation, Integrity, Respect, Responsibility, and Global Citizenship, we foster an environment where diversity is valued and accountability is paramount.
About.highlight1: Bekhzod Jalilov, CEO. Elevating global standards in education.
About.highlight2: Javohir Ruziyev, Head of Marketing. Building our professional digital presence.
About.highlight3: Feruza Sotiboldiyeva, Counselor. Ensuring emotional and academic support for all students.
About.highlight4: Naimov Diyorbek, Head of Academic Trainings. Specializing in advanced teaching methodology.
About.value1Desc: Rigorous standards pushing boundaries to achieve top 1% global percentiles.
About.value2Desc: Embracing cutting-edge tech and adaptive learning paradigms for the modern era.
About.value3Desc: Uncompromising ethics fostering a culture of absolute trust and profound respect.
About.value4Desc: Celebrating diversity and nurturing an inclusive, empowering ecosystem for all.
About.value5Desc: Instilling deep accountability to mold the proactive global citizens of tomorrow.
About.value6Desc: Preparing students to lead intelligently in an interconnected, borderless world.
About.fac1Desc: Latest hardware for AI, Web3, and advanced algorithmic programming.
About.fac2Desc: Real-world simulation hubs designed for young entrepreneurs.
About.fac3Desc: Vast multimedia resources supporting massive research initiatives.
About.fac4Desc: Olympic-standard facilities forging physical resilience and teamwork.
About.fac5Desc: University-grade equipment for quantum mechanics and biotech.
About.fac6Desc: A sanctuary of comfort and focus for our boarding scholars.
About.time1: Inception in Tashkent with a vision to redefine education.
About.time2: First major integration of Business & IT specialized tracks.
About.time3: International accreditation achieved; expanded to a second campus.
About.time4: Deployed a customized digital learning ecosystem across all levels.
About.time5: Grew to 4 sprawling campuses serving thousands of elite students.
About.time6: Global expansion: launching our monumental European flagship in Germany.

Curriculum.title: Specialized Curriculum
Curriculum.description: Deeply focused on Business, IT, and STEM. We offer rigorous academic modules specifically designed to mold global leaders and successful professionals.
Curriculum.businessDesc: Comprehensive financial literacy, entrepreneurship, marketing, and core business studies to forge commercial acumen.
Curriculum.itDesc: Cutting-edge Information Technology — programming, web development, systems architecture, and cybersecurity.
Curriculum.mathDesc: Intense quantitative reasoning and advanced algebra tailored for top SAT scores above 1400.
Curriculum.englishDesc: Mastery of the English language with rigorous IELTS preparation targeting Band 7.0+ scores.
Curriculum.apDesc: College Board accredited Advanced Placement and A-Level pathways for global university admissions.
Curriculum.logicDesc: A foundational course developing deep analytical reasoning, problem decomposition, and systematic analysis.
Curriculum.sportDesc: Comprehensive sports programs including football, basketball, and fitness — developing the whole student.

Results.title: Outstanding Academic Results
Results.description: Our students routinely secure placements in the world's most elite universities across the USA, Europe, and Asia, with remarkable competition achievements globally.
Results.ivyDesc: Consistent admissions to the top Ivy League institutions and leading US tech universities.
Results.europeDesc: Securing spots in the UK's finest institutions, alongside ETH Zurich and the Sorbonne.
Results.asiaDesc: Dominating placements in top Asian and Australian universities including KAIST and Melbourne.
Results.wscDesc: Gold and Silver medals, 1st place overall in the international debate section.
Results.mathAsianDesc: 6 Gold, 8 Silver, 7 Bronze medals at the international olympiad.
Results.roboticsDesc: Sweeping Gold, Silver, and Bronze at the National Robotics Championship.
Results.techAwardDesc: 2nd Place Nationally with the innovative 'Speaklish' project.
Results.wamasDesc: Student Zulayho received the Gold Trophy among 500+ participants from 24 countries.

Campus.title: Our Global Network
Campus.description: State-of-the-art computer labs, business innovation centers, and modern facilities across five campuses in two countries.
Campus.germanyDesc: The new European Flagship Campus — opening doors for students across Europe.
Campus.istirohatDesc: STEM Innovation Core — our hub for science, technology, and research.
Campus.tinchlikDesc: Business & IT Laboratories — dedicated space for practical tech education.
Campus.yunusabadDesc: Academic Excellence Center — specialized SAT and IELTS preparation hub.
Campus.sergeliDesc: Elite Athletics Complex — gymnasium, football field, and fitness center.

Footer.aboutText: Target International School is committed to providing a transformative education focused on Business and IT, empowering students to become global leaders.
Footer.rights: All rights reserved. Target International School.
